MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DILIP M. COURT TRIAL SET FOR FEB-18-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

DEFENDANT MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL FILED. DEPT #5, JUDGE WICK, C/C FOR TRIAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT DEFT'S MOTION-DENIED. ORAL DOCUMENT, EVIDENCE PRESENTED. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF. EXHIBIT RETURNED. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT
